description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:20.04 Docker image with DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive and CXX=/usr/bin/g++. Include a before_script that updates apt, installs curl gnupg2 lsb-release, adds the ROS 2 Foxy apt repository, installs ros-foxy-ros-base, sources its setup, installs g++, git, python3-rosdep2, colcon-common-extensions, ros-foxy-gazebo-ros, ros-foxy-gazebo-plugins, and socat, then clones the robosub_msgs repository. Define a build job in the default stage that runs `colcon build`. Define a lint job in the same stage that changes directory to `robosub` and runs `ament_flake8 --linelength 80` followed by `ament_cpplint`. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are required.
